positive: Symmetrical, highly detailed illustration of celestial forest flora and fauna. The scene features bioluminescent glowing mushrooms, stylized crescent moons, and intertwining cosmic vines forming a dense, elegant pattern. The central composition is dominated by a large, stylized glowing moth with translucent wings, surrounded by constellations rendered as geometric outlines. Style is neo-tribal botanical mixed with Art Deco poster art. Strong, deep contrast between matte obsidian blacks and vibrant, glowing jewel tones (electric sapphire, emerald green, amethyst purple). Clean silhouettes are mandatory. Crisp line art, perfect for screen printing, zero gradients, vector-like quality, central focus.
negative: low detail, blurry, messy, abstract, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifact, grain, grainy, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, human figures, photo, photography, realistic, cinematic, noise
